items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：安德莉亚·斯特拉称赞Oscar取得了显著的进步 🫶🏻 “我对Oscar所取得的成就感到非常满意。这一切都离不开Oscar团队、Oscar的工程师们以及Oscar本人的努力。他在奥地利度过的这个美好周末确实值得称赞。他所取得的成就真是令人鼓舞。”
items.summary: andrea stella praises oscar's improvement 🫶🏻 "i'm extremely pleased with how much oscar cashed in all the learning and the work that was done by team oscar, oscar's engineers, and oscar himself. he deserves the strong weekend in austria. it's very encouraging what he achieved." https://t.co/MYTaVrqka7
items.summary_zh: 安德莉亚·斯特拉称赞Oscar取得了显著的进步 🫶🏻 “我对Oscar所取得的成就感到非常满意。这一切都离不开Oscar团队、Oscar的工程师们以及Oscar本人的努力。他在奥地利度过的这个美好周末确实值得称赞。他所取得的成就真是令人鼓舞。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar said baku 2024 is the race he'd most like to relive among his own races 🥹🫶🏻 "it was a rea…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Oscar说，2024 年布卡大赛是他最想再次参加的一场比赛🥹🫶🏻 “那是一场非常刺激、充满紧张感的胜利。如果可以重来一次，我希望在比赛开始之前就一无所知。那天冲过终点线真是特别难忘。”
items.summary: oscar said baku 2024 is the race he'd most like to relive among his own races 🥹🫶🏻 "it was a really exciting, very nerve-wracking win. if i was going to relive it, i'd want to go into the race not knowing. crossing the line that day was very special." https://t.co/Z9THVEAj6J
items.summary_zh: Oscar说，2024 年布卡大赛是他最想再次参加的一场比赛🥹🫶🏻 “那是一场非常刺激、充满紧张感的胜利。如果可以重来一次，我希望在比赛开始之前就一无所知。那天冲过终点线真是特别难忘。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: "on the basis that you have oscar and lando, if max was available, you wouldn't sign him?" zak…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：“既然你有Oscar和Lando，如果Max也在的话，你就不会签下他了吧？”Zak Brown说道：“不，不。Lando和Oscar已经把名字刻在了他们的座位上，而且他们也没有清空过储物柜，所以他们不会离开的。”
items.summary: "on the basis that you have oscar and lando, if max was available, you wouldn't sign him?" zak brown: "no, no. lando and oscar have their names engraved on their race seat and they haven't emptied out their lockers, so they're not going anywhere." https://t.co/NgcSxvyQYV
items.summary_zh: “既然你有Oscar和Lando，如果Max也在的话，你就不会签下他了吧？”Zak Brown说道：“不，不。Lando和Oscar已经把名字刻在了他们的座位上，而且他们也没有清空过储物柜，所以他们不会离开的。”
